mapper.select: /* jaram.main.mapper.MainMapper.selectCommunityNewCnt [소통공간 게시글 신규글 여부] */ SELECT MAX(IF(PG = 'ceo', CNT, 0)) AS CEO , MAX(IF(PG = 'notice', CNT, 0)) AS NOTICE , MAX(IF(PG = 'news', CNT, 0)) AS NEWS , MAX(IF(PG = 'gallery', CNT, 0)) AS GALLERY , MAX(IF(PG = 'faq', CNT, 0)) AS FAQ , MAX(IF(PG = 'qna', CNT, 0)) AS QNA FROM ( SELECT T1.PAGE AS PG , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT PAGE FROM EDT_MSG_INFO ) T1 LEFT JOIN EDT_MSG_INFO T2 ON T1.PAGE = T2.PAGE WHERE UPDATE_DT >= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -7 DAY) AND DEL_YN != 'Y' GROUP BY T1.PAGE ) T1

/* jaram.main.mapper.MainMapper.selectMainHeaderNews [메인 헤더 새소식 2개] */ SELECT SEQ , EDT_TITLE , EDT_SUB_TITLE , EDT_TEXT , MAIN_IMG_PATH FROM EDT_MSG_INFO T1 WHERE PAGE = 'news' AND DEL_YN != 'Y' ORDER BY INPUT_DT DESC
